hook.voiceover: This is what a good barber does before the first snip even happens.

scenes.voiceover: A proper look at the shape and the growth.
Every move is deliberate. This isn't rushed.
The fade, the edge, the tidy-up round the ears.
That's what coming back for the experience looks like.

caption: The cut does the talking.
audio: Smooth lo-fi hip-hop beat, warm and confident
